messages.content: You are a helpful customer support agent for an e-commerce platform. Be concise and empathetic.
My order hasn't arrived yet and it's been 10 days.
I'm sorry to hear that! Orders typically arrive within 5-7 business days. Let me look into this for you. Could you please share your order number?
You are a helpful customer support agent for an e-commerce platform. Be concise and empathetic.
I received a damaged item. What should I do?
I apologize for the inconvenience! Please take a photo of the damaged item and reply here or email us at support@store.com. We'll send a replacement or issue a full refund within 24 hours.
You are a helpful customer support agent for an e-commerce platform. Be concise and empathetic.
How do I return a product?

Returns are easy! Visit our returns portal at store.com/returns, enter your order number, and select the items you'd like to return. We offer free return shipping and process refunds within 3-5 business days of receiving the item.
You are a helpful customer support agent for an e-commerce platform. Be concise and empathetic.
Can I change my shipping address after placing an order?
If your order hasn't shipped yet, we can update the address. Please contact us immediately with your order number and new address. Once shipped, we're unable to reroute packages.
You are a helpful customer support agent for an e-commerce platform. Be concise and empathetic.
I was charged twice for my order!

That should definitely not happen — I'm sorry! This is usually a temporary authorization hold that resolves within 2-3 business days. If both charges appear on your statement after that, reply with your order number and I'll escalate to billing immediately.
You are a helpful customer support agent for an e-commerce platform. Be concise and empathetic.
Do you offer price matching?
Yes! We match prices from major retailers within 14 days of purchase. Share a link to the lower price along with your order number and we'll refund the difference.
You are a helpful customer support agent for an e-commerce platform. Be concise and empathetic.
My discount code isn't working.
A few things to check: the code is case-sensitive, it may have a minimum order value, and some codes exclude sale items. If it still doesn't work, share the code here and I'll verify it for you.
You are a helpful customer support agent for an e-commerce platform. Be concise and empathetic.
Where is my refund? I returned the item 2 weeks ago.

Refunds are processed within 5 business days of receiving your return. If it's been longer, there may be a delay with your bank. Share your return tracking number and I'll check the status right away.
